calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post Judgment Discovery & Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-06-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. laintiff Creditors Trade Association's motion for assignment of rights and turnover order is granted. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers To Post-Judgment Discovery; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-08-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's motion to compel post judgment discovery is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objection to plaintiff's special interrogatories and request for production of documents within 21 days of notice of this order. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $340 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2006 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants
